title: 11 Dazzling SF Nurseries Where You Can Find Your Next Plant Children
content: Whether or not you have a green thumb, these 10 plant stores in San Francisco are certainly worth a visit. Are you an avid gardener with dozens of thriving plants? No matter who you are, you can surely appreciate the life and energy that these little green friends bring into your home. San Francisco is full of countless awesome plant stores and nurseries, but we’ve rounded up the 10 best ones so you can continue growing your plant family. Located on the site of an old dairy farm from 1904, Clement Nursery has been providing excellent plants and more since it was founded 80 (yes, 80) years ago. Visit one of Richmond’s oldest structures and browse a variety of unique and wonderful plants. *Location: 1921 Clement St, San Francisco, CA*. This beautiful garden center in the industrial district has been thriving since 1974. You’ll find a beautiful selection of unique plants and succulents in their garden, along with gardening books and tools.
